_comment: Sift design-slop audit config for Plate. low-contrast-text gates as error. tiny-touch-target is downgraded to warn (non-gating): Compose Material3 enforces a 48dp touch target via minimumInteractiveComponentSize() that the framework does NOT reflect in the semantics layout bounds Sift measures, so standard controls (IconButton 40dp, FilterChip 32dp, TextButton/compact 40dp) report below 48dp despite meeting the touch-target minimum. Still surfaced as warn for review.
_ignoreFindings_note: OutlinedTextField false positive: Sift samples the field's light-gray outline (LightOutline ~#C9CDD4) as the foreground rather than the dark onSurface value glyphs, so the light-theme login/register/search fields report ~1.5:1. The actual value text (dark on white) is well above AA. Suppressed by fingerprint.
